name: pdf-add-watermark
description: Add watermarks to PDFs and images — text stamps, logo overlays, tiled or single placement, custom styling, and quick presets for CONFIDENTIAL/DRAFT/APPROVED. Powered by PDFAPIHub.
author: PdfApiHub

apiKey.description: PDFAPIHub API key (required). Get a free key at https://pdfapihub.com. Files are sent to PDFAPIHub servers for processing.
